docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY.
